parameters.subject: Your AI Readiness Checklist - Emvy
parameters.html:
Hi {{ $json.first_name }},

Thanks for requesting the AI Readiness Checklist!

Here's your personal link to access it:

Get Your AI Readiness Checklist

Answer the 10 questions honestly — and you'll know exactly where to start with AI in your business.

Reply back with your answers and we'll send you a personalized breakdown.

— The Emvy Team

parameters.subject: The mistake most SMBs make with AI
parameters.html:
Hi {{ $json.first_name }},

Hope the checklist was useful!

Most small businesses we talk to have the same problem — they try to use AI before figuring out where their team is actually wasting time.

So they buy a tool, try it for a week, get half results, and quit. Sound familiar?

The fix isn't the AI. It's knowing which process to automate first.

Take 2 minutes. Look at your last week. What's the one task you did that felt like Groundhog Day — the same thing over and over?

That's your starting point.

More useful stuff coming your way soon.

— The Emvy Team

parameters.subject: What AI actually looks like in a real SMB
parameters.html:
Hi {{ $json.first_name }},

We've been talking about where to start with AI. Wanted to share a real example of what it actually looks like in a small business.

We worked with a 12-person logistics company recently. They were manually entering shipment data into three different systems — same info, typed three times, every single day. One guy was spending 4 hours a day on it.

We found them a simple fix. Cost $0 to test. Took 2 hours to set up.

He gets that time back now. No new software. No layoffs. Just wiring up the systems they already had.

That's usually where the highest ROI lives — not in shiny new AI tools. In the stuff you're already doing manually that should be automatic.

What's your version of that story?

— The Emvy Team

parameters.subject: Want a deeper look at your AI opportunities?
parameters.html:
Hi {{ $json.first_name }},

If you've been thinking about the checklist — here's an offer that might be useful.

We offer a free 15-minute call. Not a pitch. Not a sales call.

You answer 10 quick questions about your business beforehand. We review them. Then we spend 15 minutes on a real call where we tell you specifically where AI could save you time — and where you'd be wasting your money trying.

Most people find it useful even if they don't work with us.

No obligation. No follow-up if you don't want them.

Here's the link to book: https://calendly.com/emvyai

— The Emvy Team

parameters.subject: Last one from us, and what to do next
parameters.html:
Hi {{ $json.first_name }},

This is our last email in the sequence. We don't want to clutter your inbox.

If you're still on the fence — here's what we'd say:

The businesses that get the most out of AI are the ones that started before they felt ready. They picked one small thing, tested it, learned, and adjusted.

They didn't wait for certainty.

If you want a no-pressure conversation about where AI might fit in your business, we're here. If not — good luck with everything.

Either way — the checklist questions are worth sitting with. Even answering them for yourself is useful.

Best,
The Emvy Team

P.S. If you ever want to book a free 15-minute call: https://calendly.com/emvyai
